pi_items.source: Confirmed via setup_task.sh which starts ydbgui and verifier.py which prompts the VLM to check the YDBGui EHR interface.
Confirmed via setup_task.sh which explicitly checks ^AUTNIMM(0) and ^AUPNVIMM(0), and verifier.py which instructs the VLM to look for these globals.
Confirmed via verifier.py docstrings and implemented logic allocating 10 points for infrastructure checks and matching the described weights.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on synthetic VistA VEHU data. The required interface is 'ydbgui', which is validated by the setup scripts initiating it on port 8089. The target globals to review are exactly '^AUTNIMM' (Immunization Types) and '^AUPNVIMM' (Vaccination Events), which are explicitly queried in setup_task.sh and checked by the VLM in verifier.py. The scoring weights match the verifier logic exactly. It is also noted that verifier.py is truncated/broken at the end.
